markdown:
#  View the Summary Preview for a Subcontractor Invoice 
##  Background 
As you work on creating and editing your subcontractor invoice, you can expand the 'Summary Preview' card on your invoice to see what your final invoice is going to look like.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * You must be an [invoice administrator](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/add-invoice-administrators).
    * You must have 'Standard' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool.  
AND  
You must be added to the 'Private' drop-down list on the commitment.


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create a Subcontractor Invoice](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/invoice-administrator-guide/create-subcontractor-invoices)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Commitment** tool. 
  2. Go to Commitment for the invoice you want to distribute.
  3. Click the **Invoicing** tab. 
  4. Locate the invoice to preview.
  5. Click the **Invoice #** link to open it.
  6. Scroll down to the **Summary Preview**.
  7. Click the **arrow** to expand the **Summary Preview** card.   
![Admin Invoicing Summary Preview](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ac2381270dc06573b47ceeac8ba16fa0/a150f02b4e94198a654611b27d97bcca/admin-invoicing-summary-preview.png?fm=webp)


## See Also
  * [Preview a Subcontractor Invoice](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/preview-a-subcontractor-invoice)
  * [Invoicing - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/permissions)
  * [Review a Subcontractor Invoice as an Invoice Administrator](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/review-a-subcontractor-invoice-as-an-invoice-administrator)
title: View the Summary Preview for a Subcontractor Invoice
description: How to view the 'Summary Preview' in a subcontractor invoice.
